problem_statement: Customer Churn Prediction. A telecom company wants to build and evaluate logistic regression models to predict which customers will churn, using demographic and service usage features.
question: Using the full logistic regression model (all features, standardized, train split), find the highest classification threshold (to the nearest 0.05) that still achieves at least 80% recall on the test set. Report the threshold value.
agent_instructions: The data source is a directory of CSV files. Inspect only the files needed for the question and compute the answer directly in notebook code. Use sklearn LogisticRegression with max_iter=1000, random_state=42. Use StandardScaler fit on train. Sweep thresholds from 0.05 to 0.95 in steps of 0.05.
